title: Yaro Yaro Lyrics Madha Yaanai Koottam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Yaro Yaro
Singer(s): Haricharan, Monali Thakur
Music: N.R.Raghunanthan
Lyricist: Ekadasi
Movie: Madha Yaanai Koottam (2013)

Yaro yaro yaaridam yaaro
ooro pero theriyavillai.
yeno yeno idhuvarai yeno
ennakum adhudhaan puriyavillai.

Valigalil  vaasa pookkal vaarthidum
mazhigalil dhegam urugiyadhey.
nadhiyinil thondrum mega kottam
thalayinai vaari rasikiradhey.

Thaeneerin saayalai unnidam
paarthaeney nadakkayiley.
Naaldhorum usupiya nilavinai
ketteney paarkayile.  (Yaro yaro ...)

Valayal kaiyaaley vaasam thandhaaye
pasiyumillaamal nelindhirudhen.
Uruttum kannaaley uyirai eduthaaye
unnaku munnaaley thudithirundhen.
Nadhimeley midhakira pudhu alaiyaai
thalaikelaai therikiraai thirai nilavaai.

Kalavaadi pona uyir enathallava..
manam maarum enadhuyir unadhallavaa.
Aagaayam vilikura nerathil
oorellaam urangidudhey.
thoongaadha vizhigalin imaigal
unnai paarka thudikiradhey. (Yaro yaro ..)

Enadhu saamgam undahu ninaivaaley
thuliyum thoongaamal vilithirundhen.
udaindhu pogaamal enadhu naanaththai
uryiril pudhaithu kaathirrundhen.

Vidiyadha pozhudhukku vedi vaithaen.
onnaagi pogathaaney uyir vaithaen.
Idi vandhu ponaal kooda thadam illaye.
Idhayathil unnai vida yarumillaye.

Pudhidhaaga kulirkira megangal
mazhayaaga verkiradhey.
Thadumaarum vizhigalin padhaigal
yedhedho ketkiradhey..

Yaro yaro yaaridam yaaro
ooro pero theriyavillai.
yeno yeno idhuvarai yeno
ennakum adhudhaan puriyavillai.

Valigalil  vaasa pookkal vaarthidum
mazhigalil dhegam urugiyadhey.
nadhiyinil thondrum mega kottam
thalayinai vaari rasikiradhey.

Thaeneerin saayalai unnidam
paarthaeney nadakkayiley.
Naaldhorum usupiya nilavinai
ketteney paarkayile.  (Yaro yaro ...)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Yaro Yaro?

The song explores themes of love and longing, expressing feelings that are often difficult to articulate.

What is the plot context of the movie Madha Yaanai Koottam?

The movie revolves around relationships and the complexities of love, making this song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who are the singers of Yaro Yaro?

The song features the talented voices of Haricharan and Monali Thakur.

Who composed the music for Madha Yaanai Koottam?

The music for the film was composed by N. R. Raghunanthan.

When was Yaro Yaro released?

The song was released on December 1, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaro Yaro, the characters express their deep emotions and longing for each other, encapsulating the essence of romantic love. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics create a serene atmosphere, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments. As part of the film Madha Yaanai Koottam, this song beautifully complements the narrative, highlighting the complexities of relationships. The collaboration between Haricharan and Monali Thakur adds a unique charm, evoking feelings of nostalgia and warmth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Yaro Yaro, a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the soulful voices of Haricharan and Monali Thakur, this track from the film Madha Yaanai Koottam is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Let the captivating melodies and heartfelt lyrics transport you to a world of romance and emotion.
stanzaMeanings: I don't know who is who or where they are. I don't understand what this is or what it means to me.
In the paths, flowers bloom, and the body melts in the rain. In the river, the clouds gather, and the head enjoys the flow.
I saw the honeyed evening with you, but it doesn't move. I asked for the moon every day, but it doesn't show up.
You gave me a home without a hunger, and I stayed without wanting. With my eyes closed, I took your life before you. The new wave rises above the river, and you shine like the moon on the screen.
Is my life lost? Does my heart change with you? At the time the sky calls, everyone is asleep. The sleepless eyes are eager to see you.
My companion is my memory, and I have been awake without sleeping. I have been waiting to hold my identity without breaking away.
I set fire to the dawn. I gave my life to you. Even if this comes and goes, there is no limit. In my heart, there is no one but you.
The clouds that are cold are raining like a new beginning. The eyes that are tired are asking for something.
I don't know who is who or where they are. I don't understand what this is or what it means to me.
In the paths, flowers bloom, and the body melts in the rain. In the river, the clouds gather, and the head enjoys the flow.
I saw the honeyed evening with you, but it doesn't move. I asked for the moon every day, but it doesn't show up.
